data.title: Test gate does not specify which tests are required on failure
data.description: When the test gate fails (pre-commit-test-gate.sh), it does not tell the user which specific tests need to pass. The required test list must be generated by record-test-status.sh (the script that records test results), not by the pre-commit hook itself. The hook should read and display this pre-computed list, not generate it at commit time.
